symptoms: Machine trips out after running for a while.
Resets fine but trips again after 20 minutes.

tests.error-log: COMPRESSOR OVERTEMP trip recurring every 15–25 minutes.
tests.temp-probe: Condenser outlet running very hot. Intake cool.
tests.inspect-beater: Bowl and agitator fine. Condenser fan at the rear not spinning — motor seized.

flavour: Hot and bothered for reasons unrelated to the product.
authenticityNote: A seized condenser fan starves the system of cooling; the compressor thermal overload trips on a timer. Often misdiagnosed as low refrigerant — look at the fan before reaching for the gauges.
